A [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], '''Yopaxtul''' was an athlete who was active during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Yopaxtul participated in the prestigious [[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]] racing meet on [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]], winning the one hundred [[Meter/Legends|meter]] hexaped race, setting a new speed record of 6.132 [[Standard second|seconds]] in the process.

==Biography==
Originally from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] in the [[Polith system]], Yopaxtul was a member of the six-[[Limb/Legends|limbed]], [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and a sprinter active during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Yopaxtul competed in the prestigious [[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]] racing meet, held annually in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pyre Folas]] on the planet [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]]. The Vratix won the meet's one hundred [[Meter/Legends|meter]] hexaped race, setting a new speed record of 6.132 [[Standard second|seconds]] in the process. For the Vratix's victory, Yopaxtul was awarded a medal, and later posed in a picture along with the meets' biped and quadruped race winners—the [[Teek (Teek)|Teek]] [[Yeep]] and the [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] [[Pumav]], respectfully. The event of that year's Mobquet Presents, along with Yopaxtul's participated, were reported on by the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].
